dynamic-element.name: content
dynamic-element.dynamic-content: Liferay DXP 2026.Q2 is generally available, bringing new AI-assisted authoring tools, improved performance for high-traffic deployments, and a redesigned Site Builder experience. This release focuses on the day-to-day productivity of authors and developers, with shorter feedback loops in the page editor and faster cold starts in clustered environments. Existing customers can upgrade through their usual channels; the full release notes and upgrade guide are available on learn.liferay.com.
